title: Fari nella nebbia
writer: Corrado Alvaro, Edoardo Anton, Rinaldo Dal Fabbro
actors: Fosco Giachetti, Luisa Ferida, Antonio Centa
plot: Cesare, a long-distance fuel tanker driver, separates from his lonely young wife after they argue. This leaves him angry and taciturn. One day he meets Piera and he falls in love again. But after a while Piera too complains.
